sentences.arabic: تَنَاوَلِ الْفَوَاكِهَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لِأَنَّهَا تَحْتَوِي عَلَى فِيتَامِينَاتٍ كَثِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Jedi voće svaki dan jer ono sadrži mnogo vitamina.
sentences.translationEn: Eat fruits every day because they contain many vitamins.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ التُّفَّاحُ وَالْبُرْتُقَالُ فِي تَقْوِيَةِ جِهَازِ الْمَنَاعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Jabuke i narandže pomažu u jačanju imunološkog sistema.
sentences.translationEn: Apples and oranges help in strengthening the immune system.

sentences.arabic: السُّكَّرُ الطَّبِيعِيُّ فِي الْفَاكِهَةِ أَفْضَلُ لِلْجِسْمِ مِنَ السُّكَّرِ الصِّنَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Prirodni šećer u voću je bolji za tijelo od industrijskog šećera.
sentences.translationEn: Natural sugar in fruit is better for the body than industrial sugar.
